helpful: Provisioned filed-document text (QP, petition, BIO) carried nearly all the signal for this cell
statpack circuit / relist / per-Term cuts gave a concrete anchor for the CFR-adjusted grant probability
MCP docket lookup cheaply confirmed the forward cell is genuinely pending

notes: Two corpus queries cost ~110 MB of ranged reads each and matched nothing; a cheap 'no match' pre-check or a petition-oriented index would save most of that transfer.
